Home > @imqueue/rpc > IMQCache > apply

IMQCache.apply() method

Overrides existing adapter options with the given ones.

Signature:

static apply(adapter: ICacheAdapter | string, options: any): typeof IMQCache;

Parameters

Parameter

Type

Description

adapter

ICacheAdapter | string

adapter to apply options to

options

any

adapter-specific options

Returns:

typeof IMQCache

{IMQCache}
